name: 渣男前任×心機女配
description: 背叛女主的前男友與攀附權貴的女配聯手，形成雙重反派勢力。他們的囂張程度不斷升級，為主角夫妻的反擊提供最佳靶子。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: The Baratheon group invested into Viser's company and they're worth tens of millions of dollars. Look at you. You're just a broke, ugly, stinky girl. / Having you marry my daughter is truly a blessing to the Lasha family.
